xmlns:abpm="jelly:com.adeptia.indigo.jelly.IndigoTagLibrary" xmlns:pd="jelly:com.adeptia.indigo.pd.ProcessDesignerTagLibrary"> <process name="mainProcess" start="startState" var="mainProcess"> <state name="startState"> <activity> <abpm:installGlobalExceptionHandlers/> </activity> </state> <state name="Task_09i0in8"> <activity> <abpm:activity name="AG_Mail_Source_GraphAPI" async="false"
